title: Taxology – The Official Canada Revenue Agency Podcast
displayTitle: Taxology – The Official Canada Revenue Agency Podcast

items.title: Episode 14: Understanding the Collections Process
items.content: <article>The collections process happens when you owe the CRA money. This may sound overwhelming at first, but we’re here to help you understand it. You could be in the collections process for several reasons, like life changes that affect your financial situation or a small tax-filing error. Our guest is here to guide us through the process. They’ll give you tips on how to take proactive steps to pay your debts with the CRA and how to work with a collections officer to resolve them. Even if you or a family member don’t owe the CRA money, this episode is still a great opportunity to understand how the process works.</article>

items.title: Episode 13: Crypto and taxes – All the facets to crypto-assets
items.content: <article>On this episode, we’re diving into the ever-evolving, blockchain-powered world of crypto-assets! The crypto space can be exciting, but also unpredictable and sometimes a little confusing. Even so, crypto-asset activities do have an impact on your taxes. So we’re here to make sure you don’t get lost on the blockchain when tax time approaches. If you have a basic understanding of crypto, are looking to get into it, or already own crypto-assets and want to know its impact on your taxes, this episode is for you</article>

items.title: Episode 12: Tax tips for filing time!
items.content: <article>On this episode, it’s about everyone’s favourite time of the year, tax season! Ok, that’s probably not true, but it is still an important time to determine if you are eligible for a refund, or any benefit or credit amounts to help you throughout the year. File your taxes on time and make sure they are accurate to receive the correct payment amounts, and avoid any delays. Our subject matter experts are here to help you prepare your 2025 income tax return. What you need to know: new changes this tax season ways to file or make changes to a return, and how to track the status of your return online.</article>

items.title: Episode 11: Helping small businesses across the country through the Liaison Officer service
items.content: <article>Being a small business owner or self-employed individual is a lot of work - meeting clients, fulfilling online orders, developing your business’s website, and much more. If you’re acting as the accountant for your business, you also keep your business records up to date for taxes. Did you know the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) has a program to help you, for free? Through the CRA’s Liaison Officer service, you can get personalized support to help you understand your tax obligations. On this episode, a CRA liaison officer tells us all about the program. You’ll learn what’s involved in a typical meeting , what help an officer provides, and how to schedule your own personalized visit!</article>

items.title: Episode 10: Get help faster with the Canada Revenue Agency’s digital services
items.content: <article>Canadians expect and deserve reliable and timely service from the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA). We understand that not knowing where to find the information you need can be frustrating. That’s why we’re dedicated to enhancing our services and simplifying the process for you. On this episode, our expert guest helps you handle your common tax and benefit tasks online. We’ll cover digital services and tools to get help faster, and new improvements that make it easier to manage your whole tax situation. Listen to this episode to learn the fastest way to change your address with the CRA, check the status of a file, chat online with a CRA agent, and much more!</article>
